toast.reorganizingBuilder: Reorganizing — builder will connect loose nodes...

leftPanel.startEventTip: Where the process starts. There should be only one per main flow.
leftPanel.endEventTip: Where the process ends. There can be multiple if there are different paths.
leftPanel.intermediateEventTip: Something that happens mid-flow. E.g.: send a notification, escalate a case.
leftPanel.timerEventTip: A wait or deadline. E.g.: wait 24 hrs for approval, response deadline.
leftPanel.boundaryEventTip: Event attached to a task border. E.g.: SLA timeout, error interrupting the task.
leftPanel.taskTip: Generic activity. Use when it doesn't matter if manual or system.
leftPanel.userTaskTip: A person performs this task. E.g.: review document, approve request.
leftPanel.serviceTaskTip: A system does it automatically. E.g.: send email, query API, generate report.
leftPanel.manualTaskTip: Physical work without a system. E.g.: deliver package, sign paper document.
leftPanel.businessRuleTip: Decision based on defined rules. E.g.: calculate discount per policy, validate credit.
leftPanel.scriptTaskTip: Automatic code execution. E.g.: transform data, calculate totals.
leftPanel.exclusiveTip: Only ONE path executes. E.g.: If approved → continue, If not → reject.
leftPanel.parallelTip: ALL paths execute simultaneously. E.g.: send email AND update system.
leftPanel.inclusiveTip: ONE OR MORE paths execute. E.g.: notify manager AND/OR director per amount.
leftPanel.subprocessTip: A process within another. Groups steps that go together. E.g.: 'Document validation'.
leftPanel.callActivityTip: Calls another already-defined process. E.g.: reuse 'Purchase approval' process.
leftPanel.dataObjectTip: A document or data used or produced. E.g.: invoice, purchase order, contract.
leftPanel.dataStoreTip: A system where data is stored. E.g.: ERP, database, SharePoint.
leftPanel.annotationTip: Clarifying note. Doesn't affect flow, only documents. E.g.: 'SLA: 48 hrs'.
leftPanel.groupTip: Visual grouping. Doesn't affect flow, just organizes visually. E.g.: demarcate process phases.

teleprompter.allSipocAnswered: All SIPOC questions answered. AI will generate contextual questions.
teleprompter.q1: Who are the suppliers or areas that initiate this process?
teleprompter.q2: What information, documents or materials are needed to begin?
teleprompter.q3: What are the main steps of the process from start to finish?
teleprompter.q4: What deliverables or results does this process produce?
teleprompter.q5: Who are the customers or areas that receive the result?
teleprompter.q6: What decisions are made during the process and who makes them?
teleprompter.q7: What exceptions or alternative paths exist?
teleprompter.q8: What systems or tools are used?
teleprompter.answeredCount: {count, plural, one {# question answered} other {# questions answered}}

bottomBar.diagramCorrect: The diagram complies with BPMN 2.0 best practices

endDialog.title: End session
endDialog.description: Choose how you want to end this session.
endDialog.processNameHint: A new process will be created with the diagram nodes.
endDialog.fullDescription: Saves the diagram and generates summary, RACI, audit and risks.
endDialog.saveOnlyDescription: Saves the diagram and data, but doesn't generate deliverables.
endDialog.discardDescription: Cancels the session without saving diagram data.

sop.noProcedureDescription: Generate a complete SOP document using the session transcription and the BPMN diagram context.

sopPanel.selectTask: Select a task to document its procedure

propFields.descriptionTooltip: Explain what this activity consists of, how it's done, and any important notes for the person performing it.
propFields.responsableTooltip: The role or position that performs this activity. Not a person's name, but the role.
propFields.slaTooltip: Maximum time allowed to complete this activity from when it starts.
propFields.frequencyTooltip: How often is this activity executed?
propFields.frequencyCountTooltip: How many times does it repeat in the selected period?
propFields.estimatedDurationTooltip: How many minutes does an experienced person take to complete this activity?
propFields.systemsTooltip: Software, applications or tools used to perform this activity.
propFields.inputsTooltip: Documents, data or information needed BEFORE starting this activity.
propFields.outputsTooltip: Documents, data or results produced UPON COMPLETION of this activity.
propFields.costTooltip: Approximate cost each time this activity executes.

scan.title: Business Process Scan
scan.subtitle: Discover hidden risks in your processes. Free. No signup.
scan.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your company: what it does, who it sells to, its main activities...
scan.noWebsite: I don't have a website — I'll describe my company
scan.hasWebsite: I have a website — paste URL
scan.disclaimer: Under a minute. Your information is not shared with third parties.
scan.deepenCta: By answering a few questions, the AI can find risks specific to YOUR operation, not just your industry. In 5-10 minutes you'll have a much deeper analysis.
scan.additionalRisks: The conversation revealed {count} additional risks that the initial scan didn't detect.
scan.initialVsDeep: Initial scan: {initial} risks. Deep scan: {deep} risks.
scan.saveDescription: Found {count} risks in "{process}". Create your account to save this analysis and map more processes.
scan.convertBullet2: BPMN process diagram you can edit
scan.termsNotice: By creating your account you accept our <termsLink>Terms of Service</termsLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
scan.name: Name
scan.couldNotReadWebsite: We couldn't read your website. Describe your company manually.
scan.deepenIntro: Let's dig deeper into your process "{process}". I'll ask you some questions to better understand how your operation works. Answer with what you know — there are no wrong answers.
scan.aiDisclaimer: This analysis was generated by artificial intelligence. Results are informational only and do not constitute professional consulting, legal, or financial advice. Validate with qualified professionals before making business decisions.
scan.reportBanner: AI-generated report — for informational purposes only. Does not constitute professional advice.
